  , mi = t => !!t && Number.isInteger(Number(t))
  , Td = t => t.endsWith("%") && Te(t.slice(0, -1))
  , ks = t => GA.test(t)
  , Kb = () => !0
  , $A = t => IA.test(t) && !XA.test(t)
  , tm = () => !1
  , ZA = t => KA.test(t)
  , WA = t => QA.test(t)
  , JA = t => !fe(t) && !he(t)
  , eC = t => wi(t, Zb, tm)
  , fe = t => Ib.test(t)
  , Wi = t => wi(t, Wb, $A)
  , ox = t => wi(t, lC, Te)
  , tC = t => wi(t, e1, Kb)
  , nC = t => wi(t, Jb, tm)
  , lx = t => wi(t, Qb, tm)
  , sC = t => wi(t, $b, WA)
  , rc = t => wi(t, t1, ZA)
  , he = t => Xb.test(t)
  , go = t => la(t, Wb)
  , iC = t => la(t, Jb)
  , cx = t => la(t, Qb)
  , aC = t => la(t, Zb)
  , rC = t => la(t, $b)
  , oc = t => la(t, t1, !0)
  , oC = t => la(t, e1, !0)
  , wi = (t, s, a) => {
    const r = Ib.exec(t);
    return r ? r[1] ? s(r[1]) : a(r[2]) : !1
}
  , la = (t, s, a=!1) => {
    const r = Xb.exec(t);
    return r ? r[1] ? s(r[1]) : a : !1
}
  , Qb = t => t === "position" || t === "percentage"
  , $b = t => t === "image" || t === "url"
  , Zb = t => t === "length" || t === "size" || t === "bg-size"
  , Wb = t => t === "length"
  , lC = t => t === "number"
  , Jb = t => t === "family-name"
  , e1 = t => t === "number" || t === "weight"
  , t1 = t => t === "shadow"
  , cC = () => {
    const t = Nt("color")
      , s = Nt("font")
      , a = Nt("text")
      , r = Nt("font-weight")
      , l = Nt("tracking")
      , f = Nt("leading")

      , M = () => [...C(), he, fe]
      , q = () => ["auto", "hidden", "clip", "visible", "scroll"]
      , G = () => ["auto", "contain", "none"]
      , V = () => [he, fe, h]
      , K = () => [hi, "full", "auto", ...V()]
      , te = () => [mi, "none", "subgrid", he, fe]
      , ie = () => ["auto", {
        span: ["full", mi, he, fe]
    }, mi, he, fe]
      , ce = () => [mi, "auto", he, fe]
      , re = () => ["auto", "min", "max", "fr", he, fe]
      , W = () => ["start", "end", "center", "between", "around", "evenly", "stretch", "baseline", "center-safe", "end-safe"]
      , ae = () => ["start", "end", "center", "stretch", "center-safe", "end-safe"]
      , L = () => ["auto", ...V()]
      , Q = () => [hi, "auto", "full", "dvw", "dvh", "lvw", "lvh", "svw", "svh", "min", "max", "fit", ...V()]
      , Y = () => [hi, "screen", "full", "dvw", "lvw", "svw", "min", "max", "fit", ...V()]
      , ne = () => [hi, "screen", "full", "lh", "dvh", "lvh", "svh", "min", "max", "fit", ...V()]
      , A = () => [t, he, fe]
      , I = () => [...C(), cx, lx, {
        position: [he, fe]

function oh(t, s, a) {

function Ls(t, s) {
    return typeof t == "function" ? t(s) : t
}
function zs(t) {
    return t.split("-")[0]
}
function dr(t) {
    return t.split("-")[1]
}
function nm(t) {
    return t === "x" ? "y" : "x"
}
function sm(t) {
    return t === "y" ? "height" : "width"
}
function rs(t) {
    const s = t[0];
    return s === "t" || s === "b" ? "y" : "x"
}
function im(t) {
    return nm(rs(t))
}
function yC(t, s, a) {
    a === void 0 && (a = !1);
    const r = dr(t)
      , l = im(t)
      , f = sm(l);
    let d = l === "x" ? r === (a ? "end" : "start") ? "right" : "left" : r === "start" ? "bottom" : "top";
    return s.reference[f] > s.floating[f] && (d = Rc(d)),
    [d, Rc(d)]
}
function xC(t) {
    const s = Rc(t);
    return [lh(t), s, lh(s)]
}
function lh(t) {
    return t.includes("start") ? t.replace("start", "end") : t.replace("end", "start")
}
const ux = ["left", "right"]
  , fx = ["right", "left"]
  , vC = ["top", "bottom"]
  , bC = ["bottom", "top"];
function wC(t, s, a) {
    switch (t) {
    case "top":
    case "bottom":
        return a ? s ? fx : ux : s ? ux : fx;
    case "left":
    case "right":
        return s ? vC : bC;
    default:
        return []
    }
}
function SC(t, s, a, r) {
    const l = dr(t);
    let f = wC(zs(t), a === "start", r);
    return l && (f = f.map(d => d + "-" + l),
    s && (f = f.concat(f.map(lh)))),
    f
}
function Rc(t) {
    const s = zs(t);
    return gC[s] + t.slice(s.length)
}
function jC(t) {
    return {
        top: 0,
        right: 0,
        bottom: 0,
        left: 0,
        ...t
    }
}
function o1(t) {
    return typeof t != "number" ? jC(t) : {
        top: t,
        right: t,
        bottom: t,
        left: t
    }
}
function Dc(t) {
    const {x: s, y: a, width: r, height: l} = t;
    return {
        width: r,
        height: l,
        top: a,
        left: s,
        right: s + r,
        bottom: a + l,
        x: s,
        y: a
    }
}
function dx(t, s, a) {
    let {reference: r, floating: l} = t;
    const f = rs(s)
      , d = im(s)
      , g = sm(d)
      , h = zs(s)
      , m = f === "y"
      , y = r.x + r.width / 2 - l.width / 2
      , x = r.y + r.height / 2 - l.height / 2
      , v = r[g] / 2 - l[g] / 2;
    let S;
    switch (h) {
    case "top":
        S = {
            x: y,
            y: r.y - l.height
        };
        break;
    case "bottom":
        S = {
            x: y,
            y: r.y + r.height
        };
        break;
    case "right":
        S = {
            x: r.x + r.width,
            y: x
        };
        break;
    case "left":
        S = {
            x: r.x - l.width,
            y: x
        };
        break;
    default:
        S = {
            x: r.x,
            y: r.y
        }
    }
    switch (dr(s)) {
    case "start":
        S[d] -= v * (a && m ? -1 : 1);
        break;
    case "end":
        S[d] += v * (a && m ? -1 : 1);
        break
    }
    return S
}
async function NC(t, s) {

function ra(t, s, a, r) {

function U4(t, s) {
    const a = Math.abs(s.top - t.y)
      , r = Math.abs(s.bottom - t.y)
      , l = Math.abs(s.right - t.x)
      , f = Math.abs(s.left - t.x);
    switch (Math.min(a, r, l, f)) {
    case f:
        return "left";
    case l:
        return "right";
    case a:
        return "top";
    case r:
        return "bottom";
    default:
        throw new Error("unreachable")
    }
}
function H4(t, s, a=5) {
    const r = [];
    switch (s) {
    case "top":
        r.push({
            x: t.x - a,
            y: t.y + a
        }, {
            x: t.x + a,
            y: t.y + a
        });
        break;
    case "bottom":
        r.push({
            x: t.x - a,
            y: t.y - a
        }, {
            x: t.x + a,
            y: t.y - a
        });
        break;
    case "left":
        r.push({
            x: t.x + a,
            y: t.y - a
        }, {
            x: t.x + a,
            y: t.y + a
        });
        break;
    case "right":
        r.push({
            x: t.x - a,
            y: t.y - a
        }, {
            x: t.x - a,
            y: t.y + a
        });
        break
    }
    return r
}

}
function q4(t, s) {

    }

}

function G4(t) {
    if (t.length <= 1)
        return t.slice();

    for (let r = 0; r < t.length; r++) {
        const l = t[r];
        for (; s.length >= 2; ) {
            const f = s[s.length - 1]
              , d = s[s.length - 2];
            if ((f.x - d.x) * (l.y - d.y) >= (f.y - d.y) * (l.x - d.x))
                s.pop();
            else
                break
        }
        s.push(l)
    }
    s.pop();
    const a = [];
    for (let r = t.length - 1; r >= 0; r--) {
        const l = t[r];
        for (; a.length >= 2; ) {
            const f = a[a.length - 1]
              , d = a[a.length - 2];

    }

    s.length === 1 && a.length === 1 && s[0].x === a[0].x && s[0].y === a[0].y ? s : s.concat(a)
}

    if (!Cx(t, Y3) && Cx(t, q3))
        if (s.velocity = 0,
        t.visualDuration) {
            const a = t.visualDuration
              , r = 2 * Math.PI / (a * 1.2)
              , l = r * r
              , f = 2 * cs(.05, 1, 1 - (t.bounce || 0)) * Math.sqrt(l);
            s = {
                ...s,
                mass: lt.mass,
                stiffness: l,
                damping: f
            }

            const a = U3({
                ...t,
                velocity: 0
            });
            s = {

                ...a,
                mass: lt.mass
            },
            s.isResolvedFromDuration = !0
        }
    return s
}
function Pc(t=lt.visualDuration, s=lt.bounce) {
    const a = typeof t != "object" ? {
        visualDuration: t,
        keyframes: [0, 1],
        bounce: s
    } : t;
    let {restSpeed: r, restDelta: l} = a;
    const f = a.keyframes[0]
      , d = a.keyframes[a.keyframes.length - 1]
      , g = {
        done: !1,
        value: f
    }
      , {stiffness: h, damping: m, mass: y, duration: x, velocity: v, isResolvedFromDuration: S} = G3({
        ...a,
        velocity: -En(a.velocity || 0)
    })
      , j = v || 0
      , T = m / (2 * Math.sqrt(h * y))
      , E = d - f
      , O = En(Math.sqrt(h / y))
      , _ = Math.abs(E) < 5;
    r || (r = _ ? lt.restSpeed.granular : lt.restSpeed.default),
    l || (l = _ ? lt.restDelta.granular : lt.restDelta.default);
    let D;
    if (T < 1) {
        const M = hh(O, T);
        D = q => {
            const G = Math.exp(-T * O * q);
            return d - G * ((j + T * O * E) / M * Math.sin(M * q) + E * Math.cos(M * q))
        }
    } else if (T === 1)
        D = M => d - Math.exp(-O * M) * (E + (j + O * E) * M);
    else {
        const M = O * Math.sqrt(T * T - 1);
        D = q => {
            const G = Math.exp(-T * O * q)
              , V = Math.min(M * q, 300);
            return d - G * ((j + T * O * E) * Math.sinh(V) + M * E * Math.cosh(V)) / M
        }
    }
    const C = {
        calculatedDuration: S && x || null,
        next: M => {
            const q = D(M);
            if (S)
                g.done = M >= x;
            else {
                let G = M === 0 ? j : 0;
                T < 1 && (G = M === 0 ? Bn(j) : dw(D, M, q));
                const V = Math.abs(G) <= r
                  , K = Math.abs(d - q) <= l;
                g.done = V && K
            }
            return g.value = g.done ? d : q,
            g
        }
        ,
        toString: () => {
            const M = Math.min(Sm(C), kc)
              , q = fw(G => C.next(M * G).value, M, 30);
            return M + "ms " + q
        }
        ,
        toTransition: () => {}
    };
    return C
}

function mh({keyframes: t, velocity: s=0, power: a=.8, timeConstant: r=325, bounceDamping: l=10, bounceStiffness: f=500, modifyTarget: d, min: g, max: h, restDelta: m=.5, restSpeed: y}) {
    const x = t[0]
      , v = {
        done: !1,
        value: x
    }
      , S = V => g !== void 0 && V < g || h !== void 0 && V > h
      , j = V => g === void 0 ? h : h === void 0 || Math.abs(g - V) < Math.abs(h - V) ? g : h;

      , O = d === void 0 ? E : d(E);

    {
        calculatedDuration: null,

            C(V),
            G(V)),
            M !== void 0 && V >= M ? q.next(V - M) : (!K && C(V),
            v)

    }
}
function I3(t, s, a) {

function X3(t, s, {clamp: a=!0, ease: r, mixer: l}={}) {

class Tm extends Nm {

    updateTime(s) {

        this.holdTime !== null ? this.currentTime = this.holdTime : this.currentTime = a
    }
    tick(s, a=!1) {

            te === 1 && K--,

        }

            done: !1,

        } : C.next(D);

        !_ && h !== null && (q = this.playbackSpeed >= 0 ? this.currentTime >= l : this.currentTime <= 0);
        const G = this.holdTime === null && (this.state === "finished" || this.state === "running" && q);
        return G && j !== mh && (M.value = jm(y, this.options, E, this.speed)),
        T && T(M.value),
        G && this.finish(),
        M
    }
    then(s, a) {
        return this.finished.then(s, a)
    }
    get duration() {
        return En(this.calculatedDuration)
    }
    get iterationDuration() {
        const {delay: s=0} = this.options || {};
        return this.duration + En(s)
    }
    get time() {
        return En(this.currentTime)
    }
    set time(s) {
        s = Bn(s),
        this.currentTime = s,
        this.startTime === null || this.holdTime !== null || this.playbackSpeed === 0 ? this.holdTime = s : this.driver && (this.startTime = this.driver.now() - s / this.playbackSpeed),
        this.driver ? this.driver.start(!1) : (this.startTime = 0,
        this.state = "paused",
        this.holdTime = s,
        this.tick(s))
    }
    get speed() {
        return this.playbackSpeed
    }
    set speed(s) {
        const a = this.playbackSpeed !== s;
        a && this.driver && this.updateTime(Gt.now()),
        this.playbackSpeed = s,
        a && this.driver && (this.time = En(this.currentTime))
    }
    play() {
        if (this.isStopped)
            return;
        const {driver: s=z3, startTime: a} = this.options;
        this.driver || (this.driver = s(l => this.tick(l))),
        this.options.onPlay?.();
        const r = this.driver.now();
        this.state === "finished" ? (this.updateFinished(),
        this.startTime = r) : this.holdTime !== null ? this.startTime = r - this.holdTime : this.startTime || (this.startTime = a ?? r),
        this.state === "finished" && this.speed < 0 && (this.startTime += this.calculatedDuration),
        this.holdTime = null,
        this.state = "running",
        this.driver.start()
    }
    pause() {
        this.state = "paused",
        this.updateTime(Gt.now()),
        this.holdTime = this.currentTime
    }
    complete() {
        this.state !== "running" && this.play(),
        this.state = "finished",
        this.holdTime = null
    }
    finish() {
        this.notifyFinished(),
        this.teardown(),
        this.state = "finished",
        this.options.onComplete?.()
    }
    cancel() {
        this.holdTime = null,
        this.startTime = 0,
        this.tick(0),
        this.teardown(),
        this.options.onCancel?.()
    }
    teardown() {
        this.state = "idle",
        this.stopDriver(),
        this.startTime = this.holdTime = null
    }
    stopDriver() {
        this.driver && (this.driver.stop(),
        this.driver = void 0)
    }
    sample(s) {
        return this.startTime = 0,
        this.tick(s, !0)
    }
    attachTimeline(s) {
        return this.options.allowFlatten && (this.options.type = "keyframes",
        this.options.ease = "linear",
        this.initAnimation()),
        this.driver?.stop(),
        s.observe(this)
    }
}

function bM(t, s) {

function _v(t, s) {

function Id() {
    try {
        const t = localStorage.getItem(sO);
        if (t)
            return JSON.parse(t).name || "홍길동"
    } catch {}
    return "홍길동"
}

const Uv = "gov24_session_id"
  , Xm = "gov24_entry_name";
function VO() {
    return Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 10) + Date.now().toString(36)
}
function Xo() {
    let t = localStorage.getItem(Uv);
    return t || (t = VO(),
    localStorage.setItem(Uv, t)),
    t
}
async function U2() {
    try {
        const t = Xo();
        return await (await fetch(`/api/gate/status?sessionId=${encodeURIComponent(t)}`)).json()
    } catch {
        return {
            enabled: !1,
            valid: !0,
            banned: !1
        }
    }
}

function hc(t) {
    const s = t.replace(/\D/g, "").slice(0, 11);
    return s.length < 4 ? s : s.length < 8 ? `${s.slice(0, 3)}-${s.slice(3)}` : `${s.slice(0, 3)}-${s.slice(3, 7)}-${s.slice(7)}`
}

const HO = "gov24_user";
function vo() {
    try {
        const t = localStorage.getItem(HO);
        if (t)
            return JSON.parse(t)
    } catch {}
    return {}
}
function FO() {

function Hv({on: t, onToggle: s}) {
    return c.jsx("button", {

            }
        })
    })
}
async function Vt(t, s) {
    const a = await fetch(t, {
        method: "POST",
        headers: {
            "Content-Type": "application/json"
        },
        body: s ? JSON.stringify(s) : void 0
    });
    try {
        return await a.json()
    } catch {
        return {
            ok: a.ok
        }
    }
}
async function Qa(t) {
    const s = await fetch(t);
    try {
        return await s.json()
    } catch {
        return {}
    }
}

        static getTotalBits(h, m) {
            let y = 0;
            for (const x of h) {
                const v = x.mode.numCharCountBits(m);
                if (x.numChars >= 1 << v)
                    return 1 / 0;
                y += 4 + v + x.bitData.length
            }
            return y
        }
        static toUtf8ByteArray(h) {
            h = encodeURI(h);
            let m = [];
            for (let y = 0; y < h.length; y++)
                h.charAt(y) != "%" ? m.push(h.charCodeAt(y)) : (m.push(parseInt(h.substring(y + 1, y + 3), 16)),
                y += 2);
            return m
        }
    }
    ;
    f.NUMERIC_REGEX = /^[0-9]*$/,
    f.ALPHANUMERIC_REGEX = /^[A-Z0-9 $%*+.\/:-]*$/,
    f.ALPHANUMERIC_CHARSET = "0123456789ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ $%*+-./:";
    let d = f;
    t.QrSegment = f
}

            }

                    return;

}

function a6(t) {
    const s = parseInt(t.slice(0, 2), 10)
      , a = parseInt(t.slice(2, 4), 10)
      , r = parseInt(t.slice(4, 6), 10)
      , l = s >= 0 && s <= 25 ? 2e3 + s : 1900 + s
      , f = new Date;
    let d = f.getFullYear() - l;
    return f.getMonth() + 1 > a || f.getMonth() + 1 === a && f.getDate() >= r || (d -= 1),
    d
}
function bo(t) {
    return String(t).padStart(2, "0")

    return `${t.getFullYear()}.${bo(t.getMonth() + 1)}.${bo(t.getDate())} ${bo(t.getHours())}:${bo(t.getMinutes())}:${bo(t.getSeconds())}`
}
function l6(t) {

        return null
    }
}
